analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet emphasizes China-EU cooperation as essential for peaceful development and tackling post-pandemic challenges, highlighting economic/trade common interests and cooperation on mechanisms, rules, and technological innovation. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West or depiction of hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; it frames China as cooperative, committed to peaceful development, multilateral cooperation, and mutual economic interests with the EU, aligning with the benevolent, collaborative international role. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic focus) – Not addressed; no mention of China’s political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not discussed; no claims about domestic governance achievements or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
